query:
insert into photos
                (owner_id, storage_key, original_name, bytes, mime, status,
                 short_id, original_uploaded_at, filters)
            values ($1, 'k/x', 'x.tif', 1, 'image/tiff', 'ready',
                    'BACKFILL', now(), 'R, G, Astronomik CLS')
            returning id
